! VAV version of VWV test (to isolate VWV issue)

TITLE
	L2-10b VAV Test Version ;

GDAT
	FILE w=tokyo_3column_SI.has ;
	RUN (1/1) 1/1-1/3 ;
	PRINT 1/1-1/3 *wd ;
*

EXSRF
	r=0.2 ;
	south a=0.0 ;
	north a=180.0 ;
	east a=90.0 ;
	west a=270.0 ;
	Hor ;
	earth Z=1.5 ;
*

WALL
	-E:ExtWall RC-150 FPS-50 GPB-12 ;
	-R:Roof GPB-12 FPS-100 RC-150 ;
	-F:Floor GPB-12 FPS-100 RC-150 ;
*

ROOM
	TestRoom Vol=80.0
		*s
		alc=4.6
		south: -E ExtWall 16.0 ;
		north: -E ExtWall 16.0 ;
		east: -E ExtWall 10.0 ;
		west: -E ExtWall 10.0 ;
		Hor: -R Roof 32.0 ;
		earth: -F Floor 32.0 ;
	*
*

EQPCAT
	VAV vavcat Gmin=0.01 Gmax=0.3 ;
	BOI boicat Qo=5000 ;
	FAN fancat Go=0.1 ;
*

SYSCMP
	VAVUnit -c vavcat ;
	Boiler -c boicat ;
	SupplyFan -c fancat ;
	TestRoom -Nin 1 ;
*

SYSPTH
	AirPath -sys A -f A
		> (0.05) _OA SupplyFan TestRoom > ;
	WaterPath -sys W -f W
		> (0.01) Boiler VAVUnit > ;
*

CONTL
	AirPath=ON ;
	WaterPath=ON ;
	LOAD -e Boiler Boiler_Tout=50 ;
*
*
